title: RT-LAMP for BYV detection
author: Niedzicka, Marta
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This protocol describes the process of detecting beet yellows virus (BYV) in plant material utilising a quick and easy colorimetric assay, starting from extracted total RNA. 
 The protocol is available online:  https://protocols.io/view/rt-lamp-for-byv-detection-d6929h8e.html
steps_raw:
This protocol describes the process of detecting beet yellows virus (BYV) in plant material utilising a quick and easy colorimetric assay, starting from extracted total RNA. 
 The protocol is available online:  https://protocols.io/view/rt-lamp-for-byv-detection-d6929h8e.html
